name: donggu-sns
description: SNS content authoring — writing-social-content (Blog master + LinkedIn/X/Threads/Maily variants in one skill, Socratic voice-learning from the Obsidian vault, including the threads/maily publish-note formats), make-insta-card-news (DESIGN.md-driven Instagram card images with Pexels/Commons sourcing + headless render), make-shorts (news→CapCut 9:16 draft), and publish-sns (webhook publishing with preview-approval gate + ledger). Boundary: writing = words, make = artifacts, publish = ship. Preserves the user's learned voice (회고형 1인칭, 미괄식)
